name: music-display
description: A cross-platform now-playing widget that displays and controls system media (any app or website).
author: MusicDisplay

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.pack:mac: npm run render:icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.dist:mac: npm run render:icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run render:icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --publish never
